title: Gold on track for worst month since 2008 as Iran war enters its fifth week
summary_full: Gold edged higher on Tuesday morning, but the metal remained on course to notch its biggest monthly decline in almost 17 years.
summary_public: Gold edged higher on Tuesday morning, but the metal remained on course to notch its biggest monthly decline in almost 17 years.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war enters its fifth week
